records.notes: Release information explicitly documents an English-scoped Cosmos Holofoil version. Evidence: ==Release information== A Cosmos Holofoil version of this card with the Unified Minds expansion logo in the bottom right corner of the artwork was given away in various countries to celebrate the launch of the set on August 2, 2019.
